code: java class Solution { public String smallestNumber(String pattern) { StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder(); int[] digits = new int[9]; for (int i = 0; i < 9; i++) { digits[i] = i + 1; } int i = 0; while (i < pattern.length()) { if (pattern.charAt(i) == 'I') { sb.append(digits[0]); digits[0] = digits[1]; for (int j = 1; j < 9; j++) { digits[j] = digits[j + 1]; } } else { sb.append(digits[8]); digits[8] = digits[7]; for (int j = 7; j > 0; j--) { digits[j] = digits[j - 1]; } } i++; } return sb.toString(); } }
